title: is_simple_space_prop and Phase 2 match arm can diverge silently
description: Scenario: contributor adds new simple Space prop (e.g. "owner") to is_simple_space_prop but forgets the match arm in space_set Phase 2 — maintenance consequence: the _ => {} catch-all swallows the write silently, returning updated while not persisting the value. No compile error. No runtime error. This is exactly the class of bug fixed in this batch (name/description falling through to member-patch validation). The comment "add new arms here" is not a compiler check. Fix: consider an exhaustive enum for simple space props, or at minimum add a test that a set of the currently-known simple props actually round-trips.
